## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, compliance challenges, and AI-focused keyword research for Relay Financial's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Compliance issues with partner bank are causing delays in content publication; new strategies discussed to streamline process](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [New AI-focused content cluster planned, targeting small business pain points and home services vertical](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Automation between Airtable and Notion to be set up to improve workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Content publication strategy agreed upon: schedule one article per day using Contentful's scheduling feature](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Topics

### Compliance Challenges and Content Strategy

  - [Partner bank undergoing FDIC audit, leading to stringent review process](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Inconsistent feedback on disclosure requirements causing delays](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [New approach: mention Relay only at end of articles when possible to simplify compliance](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Explore using pre-approved CTA boxes in Contentful for product mentions](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### AI-Focused Content Cluster

  - [New keyword research approach focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
      - [AI adoption anxiety for small businesses](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Practical use cases in different business functions](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Verticalized content, especially for home services](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Comparisons between AI and traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Cost and ROI considerations for small businesses](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Practical implementation guides](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [AI for financial decision-making (aligning with Relay's forecast tool)](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### Content Management and Workflow

  - [9 articles ready to publish, 2-3 more submitted for review](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Request for higher-level Airtable access to set up Zapier automation with Notion](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Discussion on best practices for publishing approved content (scheduling one per day)](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### SEO Impact and Projections

  - [Conservative estimate of 2-5% traffic growth within a few months from new content](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Domain authority growth expectations: 1-3 points per year without major backlinking efforts](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of industry-specific domain authority thresholds and competition](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bailey to follow up on Contentful login issues and staging of new content](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Bailey to request upgraded Airtable access for Dave (editor or creator level)](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Dave to review new AI-focused article topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Team to implement one-article-per-day publishing schedule once approvals are received](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Aida to set up Looker dashboard for performance tracking once URLs are live](https://fathom.video/share/8FqRTXiPL3i9VBWxJktTa7o6yqL5e4Mh?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
